positive: A minimalist, geometric celestial body study featuring a stylized crescent moon and constellations emerging from crystalline cosmic dust. The composition should be highly symmetrical, centered, and adaptable for apparel printing. Use a limited color palette of deep midnight blue, electric cyan, ethereal gold, and stark black. The style should be a fusion of Art Deco geometry and scientific illustration, rendered with strong contrast and clean, vector-like lines. Focus on negative space and striking silhouettes. Cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed, flat lay perspective, highly printable, suitable for screen printing, 8K, highly detailed, graphic novel aesthetic.
